hero.title: Powering the Future of Electric Motors
hero.subtitle: A professional community dedicated to advancing electric motor technology and connecting industry leaders worldwide.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: The Electric Motor Society unites engineers, researchers, manufacturers, and innovators to accelerate the development and adoption of electric motor technology across all industries.

networking.title: Professional Networking
networking.description: Connect with leading experts, researchers, and industry professionals in the electric motor field.

research.title: Research Collaboration
research.description: Access cutting-edge research and collaborate on groundbreaking motor technology projects.

resources.title: Technical Resources
resources.description: Get access to technical papers, standards, and best practices in motor engineering.

events.title: Events & Workshops
events.description: Participate in conferences, webinars, and hands-on workshops led by industry experts.

hero.title: Become a Sponsor
hero.subtitle: Partner with the Electric Motor Society to shape the future of motor technology and connect with industry leaders.

hero.title: Membership
hero.subtitle: Join a global community of electric motor professionals and advance your career.

hero.title: University Partnerships
hero.subtitle: Collaborate with EMS on research, talent development, and technology transfer.

hero.title: Motor Quote Request
hero.subtitle: Get a professional quote for your custom electric motor requirements.

blog.title: Electric Motor Blog
blog.subtitle: Insights, technical articles, and industry news about electric motor technology.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.description: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest articles and industry insights.

footer.description: Advancing electric motor technology through collaboration, research, and professional development.
